note: M12b (F5) — projection angle primitive. tables.tantoangle_table (shared R6: BAM angle whose tangent is i/SLOPERANGE; [0]=0, [2048]=ANG45=0x20000000) + reference_model.point_to_angle (R_PointToAngle2: DOOM octant fold + SlopeDiv + tantoangle, no runtime atan) + _slope_div. The angle the wall projection (M12c) and the fj angle LUT build on.
doom_faithful: octant fold incl. +-1 boundary quirks (N=ANG90-1, W=ANG180-1, S=ANG270, NE diag=ANG45-1); SlopeDiv den<512 -> SLOPERANGE clamp; inputs are 16.16 world units
note_units: SlopeDiv tuning is 16.16-scale; the renderer's exact projection precision (D6) is settled in M12c
